title: Proteomics quality and standard: from a regulatory perspective.
author: Gu Q Yu LR
content: S-EPMC8463138 PMC8463138 Proteomics quality and standard: from a regulatory perspective. Proteomics has emerged as a rapidly expanding field dealing with large-scale protein analyses. It is anticipated that proteomics data will be increasingly submitted to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA
